description: Style Note Slip into absolute comfort with this printed T-shirt from flying machine and hit the dance floor in style. Created using soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt looks great with denim trousers or skirts, or try it with shorts and kitten-heel sandals.Product Details Black T-shirt, has short sleeves, round neckline, stitched on purple suspenders and print on the chestMaterial Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not tumble dryUse warm iron, do not iron on print or embroiderySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and shoulders 33") is wearing a size M
